title: Match Before Apply
description: A product I built to help candidates understand how well their CV matches a job description before applying. It analyzes CV-job fit, generates a match score, and gives ATS-focused improvement suggestions through a multi-agent AI workflow.

title: ADStore
description: A secondhand marketplace iOS app with real-time chat and listing functionality, powered by Firebase and GCP.

title: Pong Game
description: Backend for a multiplayer tournament game with real-time gameplay via WebSockets and secure authentication in a monorepo architecture.

title: Webserver
description: A non-blocking HTTP server in C++ handling GET, POST, and DELETE requests, serving static files and dynamic CGI content.
